title.phon:
om zab chö shi tro gong pa rang drol lé
sang gyé dang jang chub sem pa nam la ra da dren pa ni
title.en: The Calling upon the Buddhas and Bodhisattvas for Help

source.attribution: From the profound cycle called "The Peaceful and Wrathful Deities, The Profound Dharma of Self-liberated Wisdom Mind"; a treasure of Tertön Karma Lingpa. English translation from The Stairway to the Pure Lands by Lopen Phuntsho Gyaltshen (2009).

heading.en: Calling on the Buddhas for Aid

blocks.phon: om kön chok sum la ngö su jor pa dang yi kyi trul pé chö pa bul / lak tu pö dri shim po tok té dung wé shuk drak pö di ké do
blocks.en: Make offerings to the Three Jewels with actually displayed or mentally visualized offerings. Holding fragrant incense, make an outcry with these words:

blocks.phon: chok chu na shuk pé sang gyé dang jang chub sem pa / tuk jé dang den pa
blocks.en: The Buddhas and Bodhisattvas dwelling across the ten directions, who posses compassion,

blocks.phon: khyen pa dang den pa / chen dang den pa / tsé wa dang den pa
blocks.en: Knowledge, eyes of insights, and love,

blocks.phon: dro wé kyab su gyur pa nam tuk jé wang gi né dir jön chik
blocks.en: And who have become the places of refuge for migrators, may all of you, out of compassion, come to this place!

blocks.phon: ngö su jor pa dang yi kyi trul pé chö pa shyé shik
blocks.en: Please accept offerings that are offered by actually displaying or through mental emanation!

blocks.phon: tuk jé chen khyé nam la khyen pé yé shé / tsé wé tuk jé / dzé pé trin lé / kyob pé nü tu sam gyi mi khyab pa nga wa lak pé
blocks.en: O compassionate ones, as you possess an inconceivable all-knowing gnosis, loving compassion, execution of enlightened activities, and the power to rescue;

blocks.phon: tuk jé chen khyé nam kyi ché gé mo shyé ja wa di ni jik ten di né pa rol du ni dro
blocks.en: O compassionate ones, this person known as (insert the name of the deceased) has left this world for the other world of future.

blocks.phon: jik ten di ni bor / kyé chen pö ni dek / drok ni mé / duk ngal ni ché
blocks.en: He has shunned this world. He is taken away by death. He has no friends. The suffering for him is too severe.

blocks.phon: kyab ni mé / gön ni mé / pung nyen ni mé / tsé di nang wa ni nub
blocks.en: He has no refuge. He has no protector. He has no guardians. His vision of this life has eclipsed.

blocks.phon: dro wa shyen du ni dro / mün nak tuk por ni juk / yang sa chen por ni tung
blocks.en: He has migrated for the other world. He is groping in the dense darkness. He is fallen over the precipitous cliff.

blocks.phon: nak trö tuk por ni juk / lé kyi wang gi ni dé / gön pa chen por ni dro
blocks.en: He is running through the thickest of wild jungles. He is chased by the power of karmic consequences. He is gone into extreme solitude.

blocks.phon: gya tso chen pö ni khyer / lé kyi lung gi ni dé / sa tsuk mé pé chok su ni dro
blocks.en: He is being swept away by a great ocean. He is chased by karmic wind. He is walking toward a direction with no place of stable respite.

blocks.phon: yul ngo chen por ni juk / dön chen pö ni zin / shin jé po nya la ni jik shing trak
blocks.en: He is entering a great melee. A malignant spirit has possessed him. He is terrified and scared of the messengers of death.

blocks.phon: lé kyi si pa na yang si pa la ni juk / wang ni mé / chik pur dro gö pé dü la bab na
blocks.en: Even in the Bardo of becoming, he is engaged in causes for further becoming. He has no power. And when it is time for him to go all alone;

blocks.phon: tuk jé chen khyé nam kyi ché gé mo kyab mé pa di la kyab dzö chik
blocks.en: O your compassionate ones, (insert the name of the deceased) grant him refuge who has no refuge.

blocks.phon: gön dzö chik / pung nyen dzö chik / bar dö mün nak chen po lé kyob shik
blocks.en: Please protect him. Please guard him. Please save him from the dense darkness of the Bardo.

blocks.phon: lé kyi lung mar chen po lé lok chik / shin jé jik trak chen po lé kyob shik
blocks.en: Save him from the fiery wind of the karma. Save him from the terrifying terror of the messengers of death.

blocks.phon: bar dö trang ring chen po lé drol shyik / tuk jé chen khyé nam tuk jé ma chung shyik
blocks.en: Liberate him from the deep abyss of the Bardo. O compassionate ones, please do not let your compassion be small.

blocks.phon: ra da dzö chik / ngen song sum du ma tang shyik
blocks.en: Please assist him. Please do not let him slip away into unfortunate destinations.

blocks.phon: ngön gyi dam cha ma yel war tuk jé shuk nyur du chung shik
blocks.en: Please, without forgetting your promises made earlier; quickly muster the power of your compassion.

blocks.phon: sang gyé dang jang chub sem pa nam kyi ché gé mo di la tuk jé tab dang nü pa ma chung shyik
blocks.en: O the Buddhas and Bodhisattvas, toward (insert the name of the deceased), please do not belittle your compassion, skill and power.

blocks.phon: tuk jé zung shik / sem chen lé ngen pé wang du ma tang shyik
blocks.en: Hold him with your compassion. Please do not let sentient beings be swayed away by bad karmas.

blocks.phon: kön chok sum gyi bar dö duk ngal lé kyab tu sol
blocks.en: O the Three Jewels please save him from suffering of the Bardo!

blocks.phon: shyé mö gü drak pö go né dak shyen tam ché kyi len sum du ja'o
blocks.en: Thus, with strong faith and devotion, both self and others, should repeat this for three times.
